title: Purrfect Match: AI Adoption
description: An advanced neural network designed to match rescue cats with compatible owners based on personality traits and living environments. It significantly reduced shelter return rates by 40% in its first year.
story: I started this after my own cat, Biscuit, spent three months in a shelter because people didn't realize he was a 'high-energy' breed.

title: Whisker-Wise IoT Feeder
description: A hardware-software integration that uses facial recognition to ensure multi-cat households get their specific dietary portions, preventing 'food theft' from greedy siblings.
story: Built because my orange tabby kept eating the kitten's expensive prescription food.

title: Midnight Zoomies Tracker
description: A wearable accelerometer and data visualization suite that maps the intensity and frequency of a cat's nightly activity bursts, providing health insights to owners.
story: I wanted to know exactly why I was hearing a thundering stampede at 3:00 AM every single Tuesday.

title: Catio Architectural Designs
description: A collection of modular, open-source 3D blueprints for safe outdoor enclosures. Focused on sustainability and integrating vertical space for feline enrichment.
story: Designed for indoor cats who want a taste of the wild without the danger of local predators or traffic.

title: MeowLingo: Audio Analytics
description: A signal processing project that analyzes frequency and pitch in cat vocalizations to classify them into 'Hunger,' 'Play,' or 'General Discontent.'
story: Attempting to scientifically prove that my cat's 6:00 AM meow is, in fact, an emergency.

title: The Great Catnip Study
description: A crowdsourced data project mapping the genetic response to Nepeta cataria across different feline breeds, visualized through interactive global heatmaps.
story: A collaborative effort with 500 volunteer cat owners to see if breed truly dictates the 'nip' response.

title: Feline Fluid Dynamics
description: A physics simulation exploring the hypothesis that cats are technically liquid, modeling their ability to fit into containers of any shape or size.
story: Inspired by the Ig Nobel Prize-winning research on the rheology of cats.

title: LaserBot 9000
description: An automated, random-path laser pointer controlled via a web interface, allowing owners to play with their pets remotely from the office.
story: The ultimate solution for the 'guilty worker' who misses their feline friend during the 9-to-5.

title: Cat-in-the-Box Census
description: An image recognition app that identifies and catalogs the specific types of cardboard boxes cats prefer, using computer vision to measure box-to-cat ratios.
story: Final confirmation that no matter how expensive the toy is, the box it came in is always superior.
